name: The Verifier is the Curriculum: Execution-Gated Self-Distillation for Cross-Family Game Generation
summary: arXiv:2607.09709v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Post-training a code generator against a learned judge can optimize proxy features that raise the score without improving the artifact. We study the...
description: arXiv:2607.09709v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Post-training a code generator against a learned judge can optimize proxy features that raise the score without improving the artifact. We study the opposite signal: a deterministic, judge-free, ungameable filter -- whether a generated project launches cleanly under a headless engine (strict-launch). Under this gate, rejection-sampling self-distil...
author: Chenyu Zhou, Qiliang Jiang, Shuning Wu, Xu Zhou
